name: Schedule Deployer Upgrade
description: Self-upgrade switchover for the oci-lxc-deployer container. Cannot stop+start its own source container directly (would kill this script's SSH session), so it registers a systemd transient unit on the PVE host that performs 'pct stop SOURCE && pct start TARGET' after a short delay. Also writes a marker file into the new container's /config volume so the new deployer can run post-upgrade finalization tasks on first boot.
